name: network.clockchain/clockchain
description: Verified timestamping & time verification for AI agents — read neutral consensus time, anchor a tamper-evident timestamp for any content (only its SHA-256 hash, never your data), and verify it keylessly against the on-chain block. Hosted; no install — connect any MCP client to the HTTP endpoint.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Clockchain API key (per user). Free testnet token, no signup: curl -X POST https://mcp.clockchain.network/token
